results.title: Karnataka forest dept to recover Rs 400-crore land in Sirsi after 36-year delay
results.description: Forest dept to recover Rs 400-cr land in Sirsi after 36-yr delay

results.title: Wheat procurement over, UP shifts focus to maize purchase
results.description: “The three-month wheat procurement drive ends on June 15 and maize procurement in 26 districts across the state begins the same day,” principal secretary (food and civil supplies) Ranvir Prasad said.

results.title: Karnataka explores levies on second homes, NRIs to fund affordable housing
results.description: Affordable housing: Karnataka is exploring new levies, including higher stamp duty on second homes and NRI buyers, along with fees on vacant sites and development projects, to create a dedicated housing fund.
